creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
I'm skeptical of this change.  The description of the port says
"This is a backport of the standard library typing module to
Python versions older than 3.5" which implies that for
Python >= 3.5 it is not needed at all.

I'd suggest to add this to the new port instead if you want
to pull in py-typing for Python 2.7 or 3.4:

py27_RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}typing>0:devel/py-typing@${PY_FLAVOR}
py34_RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}typing>0:devel/py-typing@${PY_FLAVOR}
